name: Gina Raimondo
subject: thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Gina Raimondo
body:
Friend

Thank you for your support to make Rhode Island stronger. With your help, we're rebuilding our roads and bridges and creating opportunities to get construction workers back on the job. We're making record investments in K-12 education. Rhode Island is now the first state on the east coast to offer tuition-free access to community college for every high school graduate. And businesses - large and small - are taking a fresh look at our state and hiring Rhode Islanders.

**[Click here to LIKE my Facebook page for updates about all the progress we're making in Rhode Island.](https://act.myngp.com/el/1F_aNfreuFZ7sCI7M6KLAj-dP4ERClJnYCc3wXU6WXc=/hUU8jHK0xkn-l52P1LcylENXz6wbJKJs09z7w3yebvE=)**

Every Rhode Islander deserves a shot to compete. My father got a college degree because of the GI Bill and had a good job at the Bulova Watch Factory until it closed. So many Rhode Island families have a similar story, and that's helped shape my focus as Governor. I'm determined to rebuild and reinvent manufacturing in Rhode Island and provide hardworking, middle class Rhode Islanders with easy access to job training so they can stay competitive even as the economy changes.

Our efforts are working. Jobs are at an all-time-high and our unemployment rate - which was the highest in America in 2014 - has been at or below the national average since January. We've created nearly 17,000 new jobs, since I've taken office.

**[Please click here to LIKE my page on Facebook and tell your friends that a little action today can keep Rhode Island's comeback going.](https://act.myngp.com/el/1F_aNfreuFZ7sCI7M6KLAj-dP4ERClJnYCc3wXU6WXc=/hUU8jHK0xkn-l52P1LcylENXz6wbJKJs09z7w3yebvE=)**

Many thanks,

Gina

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/1F_aNfreuFZ7sCI7M6KLAj-dP4ERClJnYCc3wXU6WXc=/6XCDR6CYwIkwSHJ7dNUAhLHWtFOf_hQlyW4yvoh-NlE=?refcode=emwel1)

Paid for by Friends of Gina Raimondo. This email is not intended for any Rhode Island state government employees. If you are a Rhode Island state government employee, please disregard and let us know so we can unsubscribe you from future emails. Per Rhode Island State Law, individuals may contribute a maximum of $1,000 per year. Business and corporate checks are prohibited. Friends of Gina Raimondo PO Box 40794 Providence, RI 02940
[unsubscribe](http://ginaraimondo.ngpvanhost.com/unsubscribe?mmid=1F_aNfreuFZ7sCI7M6KLAj-dP4ERClJnYCc3wXU6WXc=&tiid=7mkI2tzcgh6xWxw-MW8H6vMqqGr7vI0BrgFepC6i7aE=).

name: Bob Casey
subject: Need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6ad2/51dbcc2a/344e35c8/3a33269/4050506688/VEsH/ "http://www.bobcasey.com/")
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6ad2/51dbcc2a/344e35c8/3a33269/4050506688/VEsE/ "http://www.bobcasey.com/")
This is urgent, friends:
Republicans are determined to strengthen their Senate majority and tear down every check on President Trump, which is why right wing groups have named Pennsylvania's Senate seat a top GOP target.
**That 's why I'm emailing you, friends. I've got to raise another $10,000 by midnight to protect this seat and hold President Trump accountable - but I can't unless you step up immediately:**
**[Please donate $5 or more now to secure Pennsylvania's Senate seat and keep fighting back against President Trump's dangerous agenda.](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6ad2/51dbcc2a/344e35c8/3a3326a/4050506688/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiYm9iLWNhc2V5IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJ3ZWxjb21lMi0yMDE3IiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=welcome2-2017&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Now more than ever, we need Democrats in the Senate speaking up for what's right. I will never stop fighting to protect what we value - like equal pay for equal work, Pre-K for every child and protecting Medicare, Social Security and Medicaid in PA.
But if we want to hold President Trump accountable, we have to start the fight NOW for a Democratic Senate seat. **Will you contribute _now_ to make sure I have the resources to win reelection?**
**[Please donate $5 or more now to help protect Pennsylvania's Senate seat and maintain an important check on President Trump.](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6ad2/51dbcc2a/344e35c8/3a3326a/4050506688/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiYm9iLWNhc2V5IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJ3ZWxjb21lMi0yMDE3IiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=welcome2-2017&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thank you,
Bob
[Contribute](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6ad2/51dbcc2a/344e35c8/3a3326a/4050506688/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiYm9iLWNhc2V5IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJ3ZWxjb21lMi0yMDE3IiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=welcome2-2017&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe, please click here: [Unsubscribe](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6ad2/51dbcc2a/344e35c8/3a3326b/4050506688/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia PA 19102 United States

name: Approval Poll (via WolfForPa.com)
subject: do you approve of Trump?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom Wolf for Governor
body:
\-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | | [**Do you approve of President Donald Trump?**](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecf4b/73a2bc12/31030cac/1fcc673a/4185381006/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIxODMyNiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://action.wolfforpa.com/page/s/trump-approval-poll?utm_campaign=em18_180211_trump_clk_clq_nopn_pol_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180211_trump_clk_clq_nopn_pol_&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=1+-+Do+you+approve+of+President+Donald+Trump") | | | [YES >>](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecf4b/73a2bc12/31030cac/1fcc6739/4185381006/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIxODMyNiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://action.wolfforpa.com/page/s/trump-approval-poll?utm_campaign=em18_180211_trump_clk_clq_nopn_pol_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180211_trump_clk_clq_nopn_pol_&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=2+-+YES+gtgt")
---
| [NO >>](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecf4b/73a2bc12/31030cac/1fcc6738/4185381006/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIxODMyNiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://action.wolfforpa.com/page/s/trump-approval-poll?utm_campaign=em18_180211_trump_clk_clq_nopn_pol_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180211_trump_clk_clq_nopn_pol_&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=3+-+NO+gtgt")
---
Friends --

One year ago, Donald Trump became President of the United States.

We want to know what our top supporters in Pennsylvania think of the President's first year in office.

[**That 's why we're asking you to take our quick poll:**](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecf4b/73a2bc12/31030cac/1fcc673f/4185381006/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIxODMyNiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://action.wolfforpa.com/page/s/trump-approval-poll?utm_campaign=em18_180211_trump_clk_clq_nopn_pol_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180211_trump_clk_clq_nopn_pol_&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=4+-+Thatrsquos+why+wersquore+asking+you+to+t")
| [**Do you approve of President Donald Trump?**](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecf4b/73a2bc12/31030cac/1fcc673e/4185381006/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIxODMyNiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://action.wolfforpa.com/page/s/trump-approval-poll?utm_campaign=em18_180211_trump_clk_clq_nopn_pol_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180211_trump_clk_clq_nopn_pol_&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=5+-+Do+you+approve+of+President+Donald+Trump") | | | [YES >>](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecf4b/73a2bc12/31030cac/1fcc673d/4185381006/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIxODMyNiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://action.wolfforpa.com/page/s/trump-approval-poll?utm_campaign=em18_180211_trump_clk_clq_nopn_pol_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180211_trump_clk_clq_nopn_pol_&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=6+-+YES+gtgt")
---
| [NO >>](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecf4b/73a2bc12/31030cac/1fcc673c/4185381006/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIxODMyNiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://action.wolfforpa.com/page/s/trump-approval-poll?utm_campaign=em18_180211_trump_clk_clq_nopn_pol_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180211_trump_clk_clq_nopn_pol_&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=7+-+NO+gtgt")
---
In 2016, Donald Trump won Pennsylvania by 44,000 votes.

_That makes Governor Wolf the only incumbent Democratic Governor running for re-election in a state that voted for Trump._

Under Governor Wolf's leadership, we've made so much progress that we need to defend from Donald Trump and his attacks. Do you agree?

[**So please, let us know if you approve of Donald Trump:**](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecf4b/73a2bc12/31030cac/1fcc6723/4185381006/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIxODMyNiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://action.wolfforpa.com/page/s/trump-approval-poll?utm_campaign=em18_180211_trump_clk_clq_nopn_pol_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180211_trump_clk_clq_nopn_pol_&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=8+-+FIRSTNAMESo+please+let+us+know+if+you+ap")

[**http://action.wolfforpa.com/Trump-Approval-Poll**](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecf4b/73a2bc12/31030cac/1fcc6722/4185381006/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIxODMyNiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://action.wolfforpa.com/page/s/trump-approval-poll?utm_campaign=em18_180211_trump_clk_clq_nopn_pol_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180211_trump_clk_clq_nopn_pol_&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=9+-+httpactionwolfforpacomTrumpApprovalPoll")

Thanks for responding,

_Tom Wolf for Governor_

Paid for by Tom Wolf for Governor
Contributions or gifts to Tom Wolf for Governor are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to: **dpwillis67@gmail.com**
If that is not your preferred email address, you can update your information [here](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecf4b/73a2bc12/31030cac/1fcc6721/4185381006/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://action.wolfforpa.com/changeaddress?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=tomwolf&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em18_180125_trump_clk_clq_inac__&source=em18_180125_trump_clk_clq_inac__")
We believe that emails are an important way for the campaign to stay in contact with supporters like you. This campaign appreciates any feedback you might have -- positive or negative. [Click here](mailto:info@wolfforpa.com?Subject=Feedback) to contact the campaign with any questions, concerns, or ideas. [Click here](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecf4b/73a2bc12/31030cac/1fcc6720/4185381006/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=tomwolf&utm_content=11+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em18_180125_trump_clk_clq_inac__&source=em18_180125_trump_clk_clq_inac__") if you would like to unsubscribe from Tom Wolf for Governor email updates.

name: deadline-alert@dscc.org
subject: Did you order the winning Women's Senate Network membership card?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
The winning 2018 Women's Senate Network card design is only available until tomorrow at midnight. Get yours now >>
---
[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-member-card?refcode=DPE-20180211-Deadline_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Team,

There are so many reasons why it's important to win back the Senate this year: Protecting Obamacare, saving Social Security and Medicare, defending working families, and more.

And the key to doing that? Electing Democratic women.

[**Pitch in $5 or more right now to elect Democratic Senate women and we 'll send you the official 2018 Women's Senate Network membership card (FREE shipping!) Hurry, before orders close at midnight tomorrow >>**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-member-card?refcode=DPE-20180211-Deadline_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-member-card?refcode=DPE-20180211-Deadline_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Here's why it matters: If we don't re-elect ALL 11 Democratic women Senators up for re-election this year, we'll lose our shot at taking back the Senate!

Our Senate women like Tammy Baldwin and Elizabeth Warren are already facing major attacks from super PACs -- and the Koch brothers just pledged to spend $400 million to stop Democrats from taking back Congress.

By supporting the Women's Senate Network, you are making sure our Democratic women have all the resources they need to win their races and fight for the Senate.

[**Before tomorrow at midnight: Pitch in $5 or more now to the Women 's Senate Network to help our Democratic women fight for the Senate and we'll send your official 2018 membership card.**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-member-card?refcode=DPE-20180211-Deadline_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

Thanks,

DSCC Women's Senate Network

P.S. Already pre-ordered the winning design? Don't worry, we have your order! [**You can use this link to order an additional membership card for a friend or family member and support the Women 's Senate Network >>**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-member-card?refcode=DPE-20180211-Deadline_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d5d1/2b07114c/8f4c2139/731ce0af/274582569/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d5d1/2b07114c/8f4c2139/731ce0ae/274582569/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d5d1/2b07114c/8f4c2139/731ce0a9/274582569/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---
